channel.title: seldon on Aiden's Firewoods
channel.description: Recent content in seldon on Aiden's Firewoods
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2020-2021, Jongseob Jeon; all rights reserved.

item.title: 밑바닥부터 시작하는 Seldon-Core - Custom Server
item.description:
Pre-requisites

이번 포스트에서는 구성하는 Custom Server를 사용하기 위해서는 아래와 같은 Secret이 필요합니다.

  1. GHCR secrets
  2. aws secrets

1. GHCR Secrets

작성한 Custom Server의 Docker는 GHCR에서 관리합니다.
k8s에서 image를 pull 하기 위해서는 ghcr에 접근할 수 있는 권한이 필요합니다.

1kubectl -n seldon create secret docker-registry mrx-ghcr \\
2 --docker-server=ghcr.io \\
3 --docker-username=<github id> \\
4 --docker-password=<secret key> \\
5 --docker-email=<github mail>

2. aws secrets

이번 포스트에서는 모델을 S3에 저장한다고 가정합니다.
k8s에서 S3에 있는 모델을 가져오기 위한 aws에 접근할 수 있는 권한이 필요합니다.
이를 위해서 아래와 같은 aws-secret.yaml을 작성합니다.

 1apiVersion: v1
 2kind: Secret
 3metadata:
 4 name: seldon-init-container-secret
 5 namespace: seldon
 6type: Opaque
 7data:
 8 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: <base64 | key_id>
 9 AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: <base64 | access_key>
10 AWS_ENDPOINT_URL: <base64 | endpoint>
11 USE_SSL: <base64 | true>

여기서 주의해야할 점은 data에 value 값은 모두 base64 인코딩 되어 있어야 합니다.
이는 bash에서 base64 command로 쉽게 변환할 수 있습니다.

1> echo 'hello, world!' | base64
2aGVsbG8sIHdvcmxkIQo=

apply로 secret을 생성합니다.

1> kubectl apply -f aws-secret.yaml
2secret/seldon-init-container-secret created

Custom Server

Seldon-core에서 제공하는 pre-packaged inference server 다음과 같습니다.

  • SKLearn Server
  • MLflow Server
  • Triton Inference Server
  • Tensorflow Serving
  • XGBoost Server

대부분의 경우는 제공하는 서버를 사용하면 됩니다. 하지만 필요한 경우 Custom 서버를 직접 만들어서 사용할 수 도 있습니다.
이번 포스트에서는 MLFlowServer를 기본으로 하지만 Conda 환경이 아닌 Pip 환경을 이용하는 방법에 대해서 설명합니다.

Model

Docker

Content

seldon-core 에서 제공하는 서버들의 디렉토리 구성은 다음과 같습니다.

1mlflowserver
2├── MLFlowServer.py
3├── before-run
4├── conda_env_create.py
5├── image_metadata.json
6└── requirements.txt

파일 중 before-run 과 conda_env_create.py 가 inference server의 환경을 구성하는 파일 입니다.

conda_env_create.py 에서 conda 환경을 구성하는 부분을 빼고 pip 설치만 하도록 수정 후 pip_env_create.py 를 생성하겠습니다.

  • pip_env_create.py 
     1import argparse
 2import json
 3import logging
 4import os
 5import shutil
 6import tempfile
 7from typing import Any
 8
 9import yaml
 10from pip._internal.operations import freeze
 11from seldon_core import Storage
 12from seldon_core.microservice import PARAMETERS_ENV_NAME, parse_parameters
 13
 14log = logging.getLogger()
 15log.setLevel("INFO")
 16
 17parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
 18parser.add_argument(
 19 "--parameters",
 20 type=str,
 21 default=os.environ.get(PARAMETERS_ENV_NAME, "[]"),
 22)
 23
 24## This is already set on the environment_rest and environment_grpc files, but
 25## we'll define a default just in case.
 26DEFAULT_CONDA_ENV_NAME = "mlflow"
 27BASE_REQS_PATH = os.path.join(
 28 os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)),
 29 "requirements.txt",
 30)
 31
 32def setup_env(model_folder: str) -> None:
 33 """Sets up a pip environment.
 34 This methods creates the pip environment described by the `MLmodel` file.
 35 Parameters
 36 --------
 37 model_folder : str
 38 Folder where the MLmodel files are stored.
 39 """
 40 mlmodel = read_mlmodel(model_folder)
 41
 42 flavours = mlmodel["flavors"]
 43 pyfunc_flavour = flavours["python_function"]
 44 env_file_name = pyfunc_flavour["env"]
 45 env_file_path = os.path.join(model_folder, env_file_name)
 46 env_file_path = copy_env(env_file_path)
 47 copy_pip(env_file_path)
 48 install_base_reqs()
 49
 50def read_mlmodel(model_folder: str) -> Any:
 51 """Reads an MLmodel file.
 52 Parameters
 53 ---------
 54 model_folder : str
 55 Folder where the MLmodel files are stored.
 56 Returns
 57 --------
 58 obj
 59 Dictionary with MLmodel contents.
 60 """
 61 log.info("Reading MLmodel file")
 62 mlmodel_path = os.path.join(model_folder, "MLmodel")
 63 return _read_yaml(mlmodel_path)
 64
 65def _read_yaml(file_path: str) -> Any:
 66 """Reads a YAML file.
 67 Parameters
 68 ---------
 69 file_path
 70 Path to the YAML file.
 71 Returns
 72 -------
 73 dict
 74 Dictionary with YAML file contents.
 75 """
 76 with open(file_path, "r") as file_reader:
 77 return yaml.safe_load(file_reader)
 78
 79def copy_env(env_file_path: str) -> str:
 80 """Copy conda.yaml to temp dir
 81 to prevent the case where the existing file is on Read-only file system.
 82 Parameters
 83 ----------
 84 env_file_path : str
 85 env file path to copy.
 86 Returns
 87 -------
 88 str
 89 tmp file directory.
 90 """
 91 temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
 92 new_env_path = os.path.join(temp_dir, "conda.yaml")
 93 shutil.copy2(env_file_path, new_env_path)
 94
 95 return new_env_path
 96
 97def copy_pip(new_env_path: str) -> None:
 98 """Copy pip packages from conda.yaml to requirements.txt
 99 Parameters
100 ----------
101 new_env_path : str
102 requirements.txt path.
103 """
104 conda = _read_yaml(new_env_path)
105 pip_packages = conda["dependencies"][-1]["pip"]
106 freezed = freeze.freeze()
107 freezed = map(lambda x: x.split("==")[0], freezed)
108 package_to_install = []
109 for package in pip_packages:
110 name = package.split("==")[0]
111 if name not in freezed:
112 package_to_install += [package]
113
114 with open(BASE_REQS_PATH, "a") as file_writer:
115 file_writer.write("\\n".join(package_to_install))
116
117def install_base_reqs() -> None:
118 """Install additional requirements from requirements.txt.
119 If the variable is not defined, it falls back to `mlflow`.
120 """
121 log.info("Install additional package from requirements.txt")
122 cmd = f"pip install -r {BASE_REQS_PATH}"
123 os.system(cmd)
124
125def main(arguments: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
126 """main algorithm.
127 Parameters
128 ----------
129 arguments : argparse.Namespace
130 """
131 parameters = parse_parameters(json.loads(arguments.parameters))
132 model_uri = parameters.get("model_uri", "/mnt/model/")
133
134 log.info("Downloading model from %s", model_uri)
135 model_folder = Storage.download(model_uri)
136 setup_env(model_folder)
137
138if __name__ == "__main__":
139 args = parser.parse_args()
140 main(args)
  • before-run 
    1#!/bin/bash -e
2
3echo "---> Creating environment with pip..."
4python ./pip_env_create.py
  • MLFlowServer.py 
     1import logging
 2import os
 3from typing import Dict, List, Union
 4
 5import numpy as np
 6import pandas as pd
 7import requests
 8import yaml
 9from mlflow import pyfunc
10from seldon_core import Storage
11from seldon_core.user_model import SeldonComponent
12
13logger = logging.getLogger()
14
15MLFLOW_SERVER = "model"
16
17class MLFlowServer(SeldonComponent):
18 def __init__(self, model_uri: str, xtype: str = "ndarray"):
19 super().__init__()
20 logger.info(f"Creating MLFLow server with URI {model_uri}")
21 logger.info(f"xtype: {xtype}")
22 self.model_uri = model_uri
23 self.xtype = xtype
24 self.ready = False
25
26 def load(self):
27 logger.info(f"Downloading model from {self.model_uri}")
28 model_folder = Storage.download(self.model_uri)
29 self._model = pyfunc.load_model(model_folder)
30 self.ready = True
31
32 def predict(
33 self, X: np.ndarray, feature_names: List[str] = [], meta: Dict = None
34 ) -> Union[np.ndarray, List, Dict, str, bytes]:
35 logger.debug(f"Requesting prediction with: {X}")
36
37 if not self.ready:
38 raise requests.HTTPError("Model not loaded yet")
39
40 if self.xtype == "ndarray":
41 result = self._model.predict(X)
42 else:
43 if feature_names is not None and len(feature_names) > 0:
44 df = pd.DataFrame(data=X, columns=feature_names)
45 else:
46 df = pd.DataFrame(data=X)
47 result = self._model.predict(df)
48
49 logger.debug(f"Prediction result: {result}")
50 return result
51
52 def init_metadata(self):
53 file_path = os.path.join(self.model_uri, "metadata.yaml")
54
55 try:
56 with open(file_path, "r") as f:
57 return yaml.safe_load(f.read())
58 except FileNotFoundError:
59 logger.debug(f"metadata file {file_path} does not exist")
60 return {}
61 except yaml.YAMLError:
62 logger.error(
63 f"metadata file {file_path} present but does not contain valid yaml"
64 )
65 return {}
66
67 def class_names(self) -> Iterable[str]:
68 output_schema = self._model.metadata.get_output_schema()
69 if output_schema is not None:
70 columns = [schema["name"] for schema in output_schema.to_dict()]
71 return columns
  • image_metadata.json 
    1{"labels": [{"name": "Seldon MLFlow Server"}, {"vendor": "Seldon Technologies"}, {"version": "1.7.0"}, {"release": "1"}, {"summary": "An MLFlow Model Server for Seldon Core"}, {"description": "The model server for MLFlow models"}]}
  • requirements.txt

위와 같이 수정하면 디렉토리 구성은 다음과 같이 됩니다.

1mlflowserver
2├── Dockerfile
3└── mrxflowserver
4 ├── MLFlowServer.py
5 ├── before-run
6 ├── image_metadata.json
7 ├── pip_env_create.py
8 └── requirements.txt

Dockerfile

Dockerfile 을 작성합니다.

 1ARG BASE_CONTAINER=ghcr.io/<github-owner>/python:3.8-minimal
 2FROM $BASE_CONTAINER
 3
 4RUN pip3 install seldon_core
 5
 6ENV LANG C.UTF-8
 7COPY mlflowserver/ /app/
 8
 9RUN chmod +r /app/MLFlowServer.py
10RUN chmod +x /app/before-run
11
12WORKDIR /app
13EXPOSE 5000
14EXPOSE 9000
15
16ENV MODEL_NAME MLFlowServer
17ENV SERVICE_TYPE MODEL
18ENV PERSISTENCE 0
19
20CMD bash before-run &&\\
21 exec seldon-core-microservice $MODEL_NAME --service-type $SERVICE_TYPE --persistence $PERSISTENCE

Docker를 build하고 push 하겠습니다.

1docker build . -t ghcr.io/<github-owner>/serving-tutorial:latest
2docker push ghcr.io/<github-owner>/serving-tutorial:latest

Seldon-deploy

  • 다음과 같은 model.yaml deploy 파일을 작성합니다.

  • container의 image가 build 될 때 requirements.txt 에 접근 권한이 있어야 하므로 securityContext 에 privileged , runsAsUser, runAsGroup 을 작성합니다.

  • model.yaml

     1apiVersion: machinelearning.seldon.io/v1
 2kind: SeldonDeployment
 3metadata:
 4 name: graph-iris-model
 5 namespace: seldon
 6spec:
 7 name: model
 8 predictors:
 9 - name: model
10 componentSpecs:
11 - spec:
12 volumes:
13 - name: model-provision-location
14 emptyDir: {}
15 containers:
16 - image: ghcr.io/<github-owner>/serving-tutorial:latest
17 name: model
18 imagePullPolicy: Always
19 securityContext:
20 privileged: true
21 runAsUser: 0
22 runAsGroup: 0
23 volumeMounts:
24 - mountPath: /mnt/models
25 name: model-provision-location
26 readOnly: true
27 imagePullSecrets:
28 - name: mrx-ghcr
29 initContainers:
30 - name: model-initializer
31 image: gcr.io/kfserving/storage-initializer:v0.4.0
32 imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
33 args:
34 -  s3://mlflow/mlflow/artifacts/17/b84160df245441fa8d5ad7c5b62a424d/artifacts/iris_svm_model/
35 - /mnt/models
36 envFrom:
37 - secretRef:
38 name: seldon-init-container-secret
39 volumeMounts:
40 - mountPath: /mnt/models
41 name: model-provision-location
42 graph:
43 name: model
44 type: MODEL
45 children: []
46 parameters:
47 - name: xtype
48 type: STRING
49 value: DataFrame
50 - name: model_uri
51 type: STRING
52 value: /mnt/models
53 - name: predict_method
54 type: STRING
55 value: decision_function
56 replicas: 1

  • apply 합니다.

    1kubectl apply -f model.yaml

  • predict를 해봅니다.

     1curl -X POST <http://10.102.231.216/seldon/seldon/graph-iris-model/api/v1.0/predictions> \\
 2 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\
 3 -d '{
 4 "data": {
 5 "ndarray": [
 6 [6.8, 2.8, 4.8, 1.4],
 7 [6.0, 3.4, 4.5, 1.6]
 8 ],
 9 "names":["sepal length (cm)", "sepal width (cm)", "petal length (cm)", "petal width (cm)"]
10 }
11 }'

  • 다음과 같은 결과를 받을 수 있습니다.

     1{
 2 "data": {
 3 "names": [
 4 "Class_0",
 5 "Class_1",
 6 "Class_2"
 7 ],
 8 "ndarray": [
 9 [
10 0.9663949459143529,
11 1.0137844346775422,
12 1.0215099592994648
13 ],
14 [
15 0.9660782736674745,
16 1.0133498258843965,
17 1.0222645232705032
18 ]
19 ]
20 },
21 "meta": {
22 "requestPath": {
23 "model": "ghcr.io/<github-owner>/serving-tutorial:latest"
24 }
25 }
26}

Preprocessor

이번에는 데이터 전처리를 할 수 있는 preprocessor를 작성해보겠습니다.

Docker

앞서 사용했던 파일에서 MLFLowServer.py 를 수정하겠습니다. sklearn의 StandardScaler는 predict 함수를 갖고 있지 않습니다. 그래서 pyfunc을 이용해서 load할 수 없습니다. 이를 위해서 pyfunc을 새로 생성하고 transform을 할 수 있는 transform_input 를 작성합니다.

  • pyfunc.py

     1import importlib
 2import os
 3from typing import Any, Dict, List, Union
 4
 5import mlflow
 6import numpy as np
 7import pandas
 8import yaml
 9from mlflow.exceptions import MlflowException
 10from mlflow.models import Model
 11from mlflow.models.model import MLMODEL_FILE_NAME
 12from mlflow.protos.databricks_pb2 import RESOURCE_DOES_NOT_EXIST
 13from mlflow.pyfunc import (
 14 _enforce_schema,
 15 _warn_potentially_incompatible_py_version_if_necessary,
 16)
 17from mlflow.tracking.artifact_utils import _download_artifact_from_uri
 18
 19FLAVOR_NAME = "python_function"
 20MAIN = "loader_module"
 21CODE = "code"
 22DATA = "data"
 23ENV = "env"
 24PY_VERSION = "python_version"
 25
 26PyFuncInput = Union[pandas.DataFrame, np.ndarray, List[Any], Dict[str, Any]]
 27PyFuncOutput = Union[pandas.DataFrame, pandas.Series, np.ndarray, list]
 28
 29class PyFuncModel:
 30 """
 31 MLflow 'python function' model.
 32 Wrapper around model implementation and metadata. This class is not meant to be constructed
 33 directly. Instead, instances of this class are constructed and returned from
 34 :py:func:`load_model() <mlflow.pyfunc.load_model>`.
 35 ``model_impl`` can be any Python object that implements the `Pyfunc interface
 36 <https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/python_api/mlflow.pyfunc.html#pyfunc-inference-api>`_, and is
 37 returned by invoking the model's ``loader_module``.
 38 ``model_meta`` contains model metadata loaded from the MLmodel file.
 39 """
 40
 41 ## Customized from mlflow==1.16.0
 42 def __init__(self, model_meta: Model, model_impl: Any):
 43 if not model_meta:
 44 raise MlflowException("Model is missing metadata.")
 45 self._model_meta = model_meta
 46 self._model_impl = model_impl
 47
 48 def predict(self, data: PyFuncInput) -> PyFuncOutput:
 49 """
 50 Generate model predictions.
 51 If the model contains signature, enforce the input schema first before calling the model
 52 implementation with the sanitized input. If the pyfunc model does not include model schema,
 53 the input is passed to the model implementation as is. See `Model Signature Enforcement
 54 <https://www.mlflow.org/docs/latest/models.html#signature-enforcement>`_ for more details."
 55 :param data: Model input as one of pandas.DataFrame, numpy.ndarray, or
 56 Dict[str, numpy.ndarray]
 57 :return: Model predictions as one of pandas.DataFrame, pandas.Series, numpy.ndarray or list.
 58 """
 59 input_schema = self.metadata.get_input_schema()
 60 if input_schema is not None:
 61 data = _enforce_schema(data, input_schema)
 62 return self._model_impl.predict(data)
 63
 64 ## Customized from mlflow==1.16.0
 65 def transform(self, data: PyFuncInput) -> PyFuncOutput:
 66 """transform method"""
 67 input_schema = self.metadata.get_input_schema()
 68 if input_schema is not None:
 69 data = _enforce_schema(data, input_schema)
 70 return self._model_impl.transform(data)
 71
 72 @property
 73 def metadata(self) -> Model:
 74 """Model metadata."""
 75 if self._model_meta is None:
 76 raise MlflowException("Model is missing metadata.")
 77 return self._model_meta
 78
 79 def __repr__(self) -> Any:
 80 info = {}
 81 if self._model_meta is not None:
 82 if (
 83 hasattr(self._model_meta, "run_id")
 84 and self._model_meta.run_id is not None
 85 ):
 86 info["run_id"] = self._model_meta.run_id
 87 if (
 88 hasattr(self._model_meta, "artifact_path")
 89 and self._model_meta.artifact_path is not None
 90 ):
 91 info["artifact_path"] = self._model_meta.artifact_path
 92
 93 info["flavor"] = self._model_meta.flavors[FLAVOR_NAME]["loader_module"]
 94
 95 return yaml.safe_dump(
 96 {"mlflow.pyfunc.loaded_model": info},
 97 default_flow_style=False,
 98 )
 99
100def load_model(model_uri: str, suppress_warnings: bool = True) -> PyFuncModel:
101 local_path = _download_artifact_from_uri(artifact_uri=model_uri)
102 model_meta = Model.load(os.path.join(local_path, MLMODEL_FILE_NAME))
103
104 conf = model_meta.flavors.get(FLAVOR_NAME)
105 if conf is None:
106 raise MlflowException(
107 f'Model does not have the "{FLAVOR_NAME}" flavor',
108 RESOURCE_DOES_NOT_EXIST,
109 )
110 model_py_version = conf.get(PY_VERSION)
111 if not suppress_warnings:
112 _warn_potentially_incompatible_py_version_if_necessary(
113 model_py_version=model_py_version,
114 )
115 if CODE in conf and conf[CODE]:
116 code_path = os.path.join(local_path, conf[CODE])
117 mlflow.pyfunc.utils._add_code_to_system_path(code_path=code_path)
118 data_path = os.path.join(local_path, conf[DATA]) if (DATA in conf) else local_path
119 model_impl = importlib.import_module(conf[MAIN])._load_pyfunc(data_path) ## type: ignore
120 return PyFuncModel(model_meta=model_meta, model_impl=model_impl)

  • MLFlowServer.py

    • transform_input 구현
     1import logging
 2import os
 3from typing import Dict, List, Union
 4
 5import numpy as np
 6import pandas as pd
 7import requests
 8import yaml
 9from seldon_core import Storage
10from seldon_core.user_model import SeldonComponent
11
12from pyfunc import load_model
13
14logger = logging.getLogger()
15
16MLFLOW_SERVER = "model"
17
18class MLFlowServer(SeldonComponent):
19 def __init__(self, model_uri: str, xtype: str = "ndarray"):
20 super().__init__()
21 logger.info(f"Creating MLFLow server with URI {model_uri}")
22 logger.info(f"xtype: {xtype}")
23 self.model_uri = model_uri
24 self.xtype = xtype
25 self.ready = False
26
27 def load(self):
28 logger.info(f"Downloading model from {self.model_uri}")
29 model_folder = Storage.download(self.model_uri)
30 self._model = load_model(model_folder)
31 self.ready = True
32
33 def predict(
34 self, X: np.ndarray, feature_names: List[str] = [], meta: Dict = None
35 ) -> Union[np.ndarray, List, Dict, str, bytes]:
36 logger.debug(f"Requesting prediction with: {X}")
37
38 if not self.ready:
39 raise requests.HTTPError("Model not loaded yet")
40
41 if self.xtype == "ndarray":
42 result = self._model.predict(X)
43 else:
44 if feature_names is not None and len(feature_names) > 0:
45 df = pd.DataFrame(data=X, columns=feature_names)
46 else:
47 df = pd.DataFrame(data=X)
48 result = self._model.predict(df)
49
50 logger.debug(f"Prediction result: {result}")
51 return result
52
53 def transform_input(
54 self, X: np.ndarray, feature_names: List[str] = [], meta: Dict = None
55 ) -> Union[np.ndarray, List, Dict, str, bytes]:
56 logger.info(f"Requesting transformation with: {X}")
57 if not self.ready:
58 raise requests.HTTPError("Model not loaded yet")
59
60 if self.xtype == "ndarray":
61 result = self._model.transform(X)
62 else:
63 if feature_names is not None and len(feature_names) > 0:
64 df = pd.DataFrame(data=X, columns=feature_names)
65 else:
66 df = pd.DataFrame(data=X)
67 result = self._model.transform(df)
68
69 logger.debug(f"transformation result: {result}")
70 return result
71
72 def init_metadata(self):
73 file_path = os.path.join(self.model_uri, "metadata.yaml")
74
75 try:
76 with open(file_path, "r") as f:
77 return yaml.safe_load(f.read())
78 except FileNotFoundError:
79 logger.debug(f"metadata file {file_path} does not exist")
80 return {}
81 except yaml.YAMLError:
82 logger.error(
83 f"metadata file {file_path} present but does not contain valid yaml"
84 )
85 return {}
86
87 def class_names(self) -> Iterable[str]:
88 output_schema = self._model.metadata.get_output_schema()
89 if output_schema is not None:
90 columns = [schema["name"] for schema in output_schema.to_dict()]
91 return columns

위와 같이 수정하면 디렉토리 구성은 다음과 같이 됩니다.

1mlflowserver
2├── Dockerfile
3└── mrxflowserver
4 ├── MLFlowServer.py
5 ├── before-run
6 ├── image_metadata.json
7 ├── pip_env_create.py
8 ├── pyfunc.py
9 └── requirements.txt

Seldon-deploy

  • preprocessor.yaml deploy 파일을 작성합니다.

  • preprocessor.yaml

     1apiVersion: machinelearning.seldon.io/v1
 2kind: SeldonDeployment
 3metadata:
 4 name: graph-iris-preprocessor
 5 namespace: seldon
 6spec:
 7 name: preprocessor
 8 predictors:
 9 - name: preprocessor
10 componentSpecs:
11 - spec:
12 volumes:
13 - name: model-provision-location
14 emptyDir: {}
15 containers:
16 - image: ghcr.io/<github-owner>/serving-tutorial:latest
17 name: preprocessor
18 imagePullPolicy: Always
19 securityContext:
20 privileged: true
21 runAsUser: 0
22 runAsGroup: 0
23 volumeMounts:
24 - mountPath: /mnt/models
25 name: model-provision-location
26 readOnly: true
27 imagePullSecrets:
28 - name: mrx-ghcr
29 initContainers:
30 - name: preprocessor-initializer
31 image: gcr.io/kfserving/storage-initializer:v0.4.0
32 imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
33 args:
34 - s3://mlflow/mlflow/artifacts/17/b84160df245441fa8d5ad7c5b62a424d/artifacts/iris_preprocessor_model/
35 - /mnt/models
36 envFrom:
37 - secretRef:
38 name: seldon-init-container-secret
39 volumeMounts:
40 - mountPath: /mnt/models
41 name: model-provision-location
42 graph:
43 name: preprocessor
44 type: TRANSFORMER
45 children: []
46 parameters:
47 - name: xtype
48 type: STRING
49 value: DataFrame
50 - name: model_uri
51 type: STRING
52 value: /mnt/models
53 replicas: 1

  • apply 합니다.

    1kubectl apply -f preprocessor.yaml

  • predict를 해봅니다.

     1curl -X POST <http://10.102.231.216/seldon/seldon/graph-iris-preprocessor/api/v1.0/predictions> \\
 2 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\
 3 -d '{
 4 "data": {
 5 "ndarray": [
 6 [6.8, 2.8, 4.8, 1.4],
 7 [6.0, 3.4, 4.5, 1.6]
 8 ],
 9 "names":["sepal length (cm)", "sepal width (cm)", "petal length (cm)", "petal width (cm)"]
10 }
11 }'

  • 다음과 같은 결과를 받을 수 있습니다.

     1{
 2 "data": {
 3 "names": [
 4 "sepal length (cm)",
 5 "sepal width (cm)",
 6 "petal length (cm)",
 7 "petal width (cm)"
 8 ],
 9 "ndarray": [
10 [
11 1.1591726272442633,
12 -0.5923730118389178,
13 0.5922459884397444,
14 0.26414191647586993
15 ],
16 [
17 0.18982966369505322,
18 0.7888075857129604,
19 0.4217337076989351,
20 0.5274062850564719
21 ]
22 ]
23 },
24 "meta": {
25 "requestPath": {
26 "preprocessor": "ghcr.io/<github-owner>/serving-tutorial:latest"
27 }
28 }
29}

Postprocessor

이번에는 score에 후처리를 하는 postprocessor를 작성해보겠습니다.

Docker

seldon-core 에서 제공하는 서버들의 디렉토리 구성은 다음과 같습니다.

1mlflowserver
2├── MLFlowServer.py
3├── before-run
4├── conda_env_create.py
5├── image_metadata.json
6└── requirements.txt

앞서 사용했던 파일에서 MLFLowServer.py 를 수정하겠습니다. 이 예제에서는 postprocessor 또한 sklearn의 scaler를 사용하겠습니다. sklearn의 scaler는 predict 함수를 갖고 있지 않습니다. 그래서 pyfunc을 이용해서 load할 수 없습니다. 이를 위해서 pyfunc을 새로 생성하고 transform을 할 수 있는 transform_output 를 작성합니다.

  • pyfunc.py

     1import importlib
 2import os
 3from typing import Any, Dict, List, Union
 4
 5import mlflow
 6import numpy as np
 7import pandas
 8import yaml
 9from mlflow.exceptions import MlflowException
 10from mlflow.models import Model
 11from mlflow.models.model import MLMODEL_FILE_NAME
 12from mlflow.protos.databricks_pb2 import RESOURCE_DOES_NOT_EXIST
 13from mlflow.pyfunc import (
 14 _enforce_schema,
 15 _warn_potentially_incompatible_py_version_if_necessary,
 16)
 17from mlflow.tracking.artifact_utils import _download_artifact_from_uri
 18
 19FLAVOR_NAME = "python_function"
 20MAIN = "loader_module"
 21CODE = "code"
 22DATA = "data"
 23ENV = "env"
 24PY_VERSION = "python_version"
 25
 26PyFuncInput = Union[pandas.DataFrame, np.ndarray, List[Any], Dict[str, Any]]
 27PyFuncOutput = Union[pandas.DataFrame, pandas.Series, np.ndarray, list]
 28
 29class PyFuncModel:
 30 """
 31 MLflow 'python function' model.
 32 Wrapper around model implementation and metadata. This class is not meant to be constructed
 33 directly. Instead, instances of this class are constructed and returned from
 34 :py:func:`load_model() <mlflow.pyfunc.load_model>`.
 35 ``model_impl`` can be any Python object that implements the `Pyfunc interface
 36 <https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/python_api/mlflow.pyfunc.html#pyfunc-inference-api>`_, and is
 37 returned by invoking the model's ``loader_module``.
 38 ``model_meta`` contains model metadata loaded from the MLmodel file.
 39 """
 40
 41 ## Customized from mlflow==1.16.0
 42 def __init__(self, model_meta: Model, model_impl: Any):
 43 if not model_meta:
 44 raise MlflowException("Model is missing metadata.")
 45 self._model_meta = model_meta
 46 self._model_impl = model_impl
 47
 48 def predict(self, data: PyFuncInput) -> PyFuncOutput:
 49 """
 50 Generate model predictions.
 51 If the model contains signature, enforce the input schema first before calling the model
 52 implementation with the sanitized input. If the pyfunc model does not include model schema,
 53 the input is passed to the model implementation as is. See `Model Signature Enforcement
 54 <https://www.mlflow.org/docs/latest/models.html#signature-enforcement>`_ for more details."
 55 :param data: Model input as one of pandas.DataFrame, numpy.ndarray, or
 56 Dict[str, numpy.ndarray]
 57 :return: Model predictions as one of pandas.DataFrame, pandas.Series, numpy.ndarray or list.
 58 """
 59 input_schema = self.metadata.get_input_schema()
 60 if input_schema is not None:
 61 data = _enforce_schema(data, input_schema)
 62 return self._model_impl.predict(data)
 63
 64 ## Customized from mlflow==1.16.0
 65 def transform(self, data: PyFuncInput) -> PyFuncOutput:
 66 """transform method"""
 67 input_schema = self.metadata.get_input_schema()
 68 if input_schema is not None:
 69 data = _enforce_schema(data, input_schema)
 70 return self._model_impl.transform(data)
 71
 72 @property
 73 def metadata(self) -> Model:
 74 """Model metadata."""
 75 if self._model_meta is None:
 76 raise MlflowException("Model is missing metadata.")
 77 return self._model_meta
 78
 79 def __repr__(self) -> Any:
 80 info = {}
 81 if self._model_meta is not None:
 82 if (
 83 hasattr(self._model_meta, "run_id")
 84 and self._model_meta.run_id is not None
 85 ):
 86 info["run_id"] = self._model_meta.run_id
 87 if (
 88 hasattr(self._model_meta, "artifact_path")
 89 and self._model_meta.artifact_path is not None
 90 ):
 91 info["artifact_path"] = self._model_meta.artifact_path
 92
 93 info["flavor"] = self._model_meta.flavors[FLAVOR_NAME]["loader_module"]
 94
 95 return yaml.safe_dump(
 96 {"mlflow.pyfunc.loaded_model": info},
 97 default_flow_style=False,
 98 )
 99
100def load_model(model_uri: str, suppress_warnings: bool = True) -> PyFuncModel:
101 local_path = _download_artifact_from_uri(artifact_uri=model_uri)
102 model_meta = Model.load(os.path.join(local_path, MLMODEL_FILE_NAME))
103
104 conf = model_meta.flavors.get(FLAVOR_NAME)
105 if conf is None:
106 raise MlflowException(
107 f'Model does not have the "{FLAVOR_NAME}" flavor',
108 RESOURCE_DOES_NOT_EXIST,
109 )
110 model_py_version = conf.get(PY_VERSION)
111 if not suppress_warnings:
112 _warn_potentially_incompatible_py_version_if_necessary(
113 model_py_version=model_py_version,
114 )
115 if CODE in conf and conf[CODE]:
116 code_path = os.path.join(local_path, conf[CODE])
117 mlflow.pyfunc.utils._add_code_to_system_path(code_path=code_path)
118 data_path = os.path.join(local_path, conf[DATA]) if (DATA in conf) else local_path
119 model_impl = importlib.import_module(conf[MAIN])._load_pyfunc(data_path) ## type: ignore
120 return PyFuncModel(model_meta=model_meta, model_impl=model_impl)

  • MLFlowServer.py

    • transform_output 구현
     1import logging
 2import os
 3from typing import Dict, List, Union
 4
 5import numpy as np
 6import pandas as pd
 7import requests
 8import yaml
 9from seldon_core import Storage
10from seldon_core.user_model import SeldonComponent
11
12from pyfunc import load_model
13
14logger = logging.getLogger()
15
16MLFLOW_SERVER = "model"
17
18class MLFlowServer(SeldonComponent):
19 def __init__(self, model_uri: str, xtype: str = "ndarray"):
20 super().__init__()
21 logger.info(f"Creating MLFLow server with URI {model_uri}")
22 logger.info(f"xtype: {xtype}")
23 self.model_uri = model_uri
24 self.xtype = xtype
25 self.ready = False
26
27 def load(self):
28 logger.info(f"Downloading model from {self.model_uri}")
29 model_folder = Storage.download(self.model_uri)
30 self._model = load_model(model_folder)
31 self.ready = True
32
33 def predict(
34 self, X: np.ndarray, feature_names: List[str] = [], meta: Dict = None
35 ) -> Union[np.ndarray, List, Dict, str, bytes]:
36 logger.debug(f"Requesting prediction with: {X}")
37
38 if not self.ready:
39 raise requests.HTTPError("Model not loaded yet")
40
41 if self.xtype == "ndarray":
42 result = self._model.predict(X)
43 else:
44 if feature_names is not None and len(feature_names) > 0:
45 df = pd.DataFrame(data=X, columns=feature_names)
46 else:
47 df = pd.DataFrame(data=X)
48 result = self._model.predict(df)
49
50 logger.debug(f"Prediction result: {result}")
51 return result
52
53 def transform_output(
54 self, X: np.ndarray, feature_names: List[str] = [], meta: Dict = None
55 ) -> Union[np.ndarray, List, Dict, str, bytes]:
56 logger.info(f"Requesting transformation with: {X}")
57 if not self.ready:
58 raise requests.HTTPError("Model not loaded yet")
59
60 if self.xtype == "ndarray":
61 result = self._model.transform(X)
62 else:
63 if feature_names is not None and len(feature_names) > 0:
64 df = pd.DataFrame(data=X, columns=feature_names)
65 else:
66 df = pd.DataFrame(data=X)
67 result = self._model.transform(df)
68
69 logger.debug(f"transformation result: {result}")
70 return result
71
72 def init_metadata(self):
73 file_path = os.path.join(self.model_uri, "metadata.yaml")
74
75 try:
76 with open(file_path, "r") as f:
77 return yaml.safe_load(f.read())
78 except FileNotFoundError:
79 logger.debug(f"metadata file {file_path} does not exist")
80 return {}
81 except yaml.YAMLError:
82 logger.error(
83 f"metadata file {file_path} present but does not contain valid yaml"
84 )
85 return {}
86
87 def class_names(self) -> Iterable[str]:
88 output_schema = self._model.metadata.get_output_schema()
89 if output_schema is not None:
90 columns = [schema["name"] for schema in output_schema.to_dict()]
91 return columns

위와 같이 수정하면 디렉토리 구성은 다음과 같이 됩니다.

1mlflowserver
2├── Dockerfile
3└── mrxflowserver
4 ├── MLFlowServer.py
5 ├── before-run
6 ├── image_metadata.json
7 ├── pip_env_create.py
8 ├── pyfunc.py
9 └── requirements.txt

seldon-deploy

  • 다음과 같은 postprocessor.yaml deploy 파일을 작성합니다.

  • postprocessor.yaml

     1apiVersion: machinelearning.seldon.io/v1
 2kind: SeldonDeployment
 3metadata:
 4 name: graph-iris-postprocessor
 5 namespace: seldon
 6spec:
 7 name: postprocessor
 8 predictors:
 9 - name: postprocessor
10 componentSpecs:
11 - spec:
12 volumes:
13 - name: model-provision-location
14 emptyDir: {}
15 containers:
16 - image: ghcr.io/<github-owner>/serving-tutorial:latest
17 name: postprocessor
18 imagePullPolicy: Always
19 securityContext:
20 privileged: true
21 runAsUser: 0
22 runAsGroup: 0
23 volumeMounts:
24 - mountPath: /mnt/models
25 name: model-provision-location
26 readOnly: true
27 imagePullSecrets:
28 - name: mrx-ghcr
29 initContainers:
30 - name: postprocessor-initializer
31 image: gcr.io/kfserving/storage-initializer:v0.4.0
32 imagePullPolicy: Always
33 args:
34 - s3://mlflow/mlflow/artifacts/17/b84160df245441fa8d5ad7c5b62a424d/artifacts/iris_postprocessor_model/
35 - /mnt/models
36 envFrom:
37 - secretRef:
38 name: seldon-init-container-secret
39 volumeMounts:
40 - mountPath: /mnt/models
41 name: model-provision-location
42 graph:
43 name: postprocessor
44 type: OUTPUT_TRANSFORMER
45 parameters:
46 - name: xtype
47 type: STRING
48 value: DataFrame
49 - name: model_uri
50 type: STRING
51 value: /mnt/models
52 children: []
53 replicas: 1

  • apply 합니다.

    1kubectl apply -f postprocessor.yaml

  • predict를 해봅니다.

     1curl -X POST <http://10.102.231.216/seldon/seldon/graph-iris-postprocessor/api/v1.0/predictions> \\
 2 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\
 3 -d '{
 4 "data": {
 5 "ndarray": [
 6 [
 7 -0.22568508012717417,
 8 2.236410242744829,
 9 0.9149322555240071
10 ]
11 ],
12 "names": [
13 "Class_0",
14 "Class_1",
15 "Class_2"
16 ]
17 }
18 }'

  • 다음과 같은 결과를 받을 수 있습니다.

     1{
 2 "data": {
 3 "names": [
 4 "Class_0",
 5 "Class_1",
 6 "Class_2"
 7 ],
 8 "ndarray": [
 9 [
10 -0.7139912744706434,
11 1.41185905424711,
12 -0.064123229924972
13 ]
14 ]
15 },
16 "meta": {
17 "requestPath": {
18 "postprocessor": "ghcr.io/<github-owner>/serving-tutorial:latest"
19 }
20 }
21}

item.title: 밑바닥부터 시작하는 Seldon-Core - 설치 [Ambassador Ver.]
item.description:
밑바닥부터 시작하는 Seldon-Core 순서

  1. 설치
    1. 밑바닥부터 시작하는 Seldon-Core - 설치 [Istio Ver.]
    2. 밑바닥부터 시작하는 Seldon-Core - 설치 [Ambassador Ver.]

Pre-requisites

  1. Minikube
  2. Helm
  3. Ingress
  4. Istio

1. Minikube

사용한 minikube version은 다음과 같습니다.

1> minikube version
2minikube version: v1.20.0
3commit: c61663e942ec43b20e8e70839dcca52e44cd85ae

minikube의 default config는 memory의 경우 2048mb 입니다. 이 경우 실습 중 메모리가 부족해서 OOM이슈가 생겨서 정삭적으로 진행할 수 없을 수 도 있습니다. OOM을 방지하기 위해서 minikube의 메모리를 4096mb로 늘려줍니다.

1> minikube config set memory 4096
2❗ These changes will take effect upon a minikube delete and then a minikube start

minikube를 실행시킵니다.

 1> minikube start
 2😄 minikube v1.20.0 on Ubuntu 18.04
 3✨ Automatically selected the docker driver. Other choices: virtualbox, ssh
 4👍 Starting control plane node minikube in cluster minikube
 5🚜 Pulling base image ...
 6🔥 Creating docker container (CPUs=6, Memory=4096MB) ...
 7🐳 Preparing Kubernetes v1.20.2 on Docker 20.10.6 ...
 8 ▪ Generating certificates and keys ...
 9 ▪ Booting up control plane ...
10 ▪ Configuring RBAC rules ...
11🔎 Verifying Kubernetes components...
12 ▪ Using image gcr.io/k8s-minikube/storage-provisioner:v5
13🌟 Enabled addons: storage-provisioner, default-storageclass
14🏄 Done! kubectl is now configured to use "minikube" cluster and "default" namespace by default

2. Helm

helm 공식 홈페이지의 방법을 따라 합니다. 이 때 버전은 3 이상이어야 합니다.
여러 방법중 스크립트 방법을 이용해 설치하겠습니다.

1curl -fsSL -o get_helm.sh <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/helm/helm/master/scripts/get-helm-3>
2chmod 700 get_helm.sh
3./get_helm.sh

3. Ingress

minikube에서 ingress addon 을 사용합니다.

1> minikube addons enable ingress
2 ▪ Using image k8s.gcr.io/ingress-nginx/controller:v0.44.0
3 ▪ Using image docker.io/jettech/kube-webhook-certgen:v1.5.1
4 ▪ Using image docker.io/jettech/kube-webhook-certgen:v1.5.1
5🔎 Verifying ingress addon...
6🌟 The 'ingress' addon is enabled

4. Ambassador

helm chart를 이용해 설치합니다.

1kubectl create namespace ambassador || echo "namespace ambassador exists"
2
3helm repo add datawire <https://www.getambassador.io>
4helm install ambassador datawire/ambassador \\
5 --set image.repository=quay.io/datawire/ambassador \\
6 --set enableAES=false \\
7 --set crds.keep=false \\
8 --namespace ambassador

상태를 확인합니다.

 1> kubectl get all -n ambassador
 2NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE
 3pod/ambassador-5bf7689fc6-9hlrd 1/1 Running 0 116s
 4pod/ambassador-5bf7689fc6-bk86c 1/1 Running 0 116s
 5pod/ambassador-5bf7689fc6-r6v9q 1/1 Running 0 116s
 6pod/ambassador-agent-8585f84d86-vbczf 1/1 Running 0 116s
 7
 8NAME TYPE CLUSTER-IP EXTERNAL-IP PORT(S) AGE
 9service/ambassador LoadBalancer 10.102.231.216 <pending> 80:30904/TCP,443:32156/TCP 116s
10service/ambassador-admin ClusterIP 10.99.228.85 <none> 8877/TCP,8005/TCP 116s
11
12NAME READY UP-TO-DATE AVAILABLE AGE
13deployment.apps/ambassador 3/3 3 3 116s
14deployment.apps/ambassador-agent 1/1 1 1 116s
15
16NAME DESIRED CURRENT READY AGE
17replicaset.apps/ambassador-5bf7689fc6 3 3 3 116s
18replicaset.apps/ambassador-agent-8585f84d86 1 1 1 116s

Seldon-core

Install seldon-core

  • namespace 생성

    1> kubectl create namespace seldon-system
2namespace/seldon-system created

  • helm chart 생성

    1helm install seldon-core seldon-core-operator \\
2 --repo <https://storage.googleapis.com/seldon-charts> \\
3 --set usageMetrics.enabled=true \\
4 --namespace seldon-system \\
5 --set ambassador.enabled=true

  • 상태 확인

     1> kubectl get all -n seldon-system
 2NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE
 3pod/seldon-controller-manager-559c567c9-jxbgf 1/1 Running 0 27s
 4
 5NAME TYPE CLUSTER-IP EXTERNAL-IP PORT(S) AGE
 6service/seldon-webhook-service ClusterIP 10.97.194.20 <none> 443/TCP 27s
 7
 8NAME READY UP-TO-DATE AVAILABLE AGE
 9deployment.apps/seldon-controller-manager 1/1 1 1 27s
10
11NAME DESIRED CURRENT READY AGE
12replicaset.apps/seldon-controller-manager-559c567c9 1 1 1 27s

Sample deploy

  • namespace 생성

    1kubectl create namespace seldon

  • pod 생성

     1kubectl apply -f - << END
 2apiVersion: machinelearning.seldon.io/v1
 3kind: SeldonDeployment
 4metadata:
 5 name: iris-model
 6 namespace: seldon
 7spec:
 8 name: iris
 9 predictors:
10 - graph:
11 implementation: SKLEARN_SERVER
12 modelUri: gs://seldon-models/sklearn/iris
13 name: classifier
14 name: default
15 replicas: 1
16END

  • pod 생성 확인

     1> kubectl get all -n seldon
 2NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE
 3pod/iris-model-default-0-classifier-546fb8bfff-cd5gm 2/2 Running 0 5m47s
 4
 5NAME TYPE CLUSTER-IP EXTERNAL-IP PORT(S) AGE
 6service/iris-model-default ClusterIP 10.98.254.42 <none> 8000/TCP,5001/TCP 71s
 7service/iris-model-default-classifier ClusterIP 10.101.118.187 <none> 9000/TCP,9500/TCP 5m47s
 8
 9NAME READY UP-TO-DATE AVAILABLE AGE
10deployment.apps/iris-model-default-0-classifier 1/1 1 1 5m47s
11
12NAME DESIRED CURRENT READY AGE
13replicaset.apps/iris-model-default-0-classifier-546fb8bfff 1 1 1 5m47s

  • minikube tunnel

     1> minikube tunnel
 2Status:
 3 machine: minikube
 4 pid: 117019
 5 route: 10.96.0.0/12 -> 192.168.49.2
 6 minikube: Running
 7 services: [istio-ingressgateway]
 8 errors:
 9 minikube: no errors
10 router: no errors
11 loadbalancer emulator: no errors

  • ambassador external ip 확인하기

    1> k get svc -n ambassador
2NAME TYPE CLUSTER-IP EXTERNAL-IP PORT(S) AGE
3ambassador LoadBalancer 10.102.231.216 10.102.231.216 80:30904/TCP,443:32156/TCP 5m6s
4ambassador-admin ClusterIP 10.99.228.85 <none> 8877/TCP,8005/TCP 5m6s

    → 이 경우 10.102.231.216

  • predict 요청 날려보기

    1curl -X POST <http://10.102.231.216/seldon/seldon/iris-model/api/v1.0/predictions> \\
2 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\
3 -d '{ "data": { "ndarray": [[1,2,3,4]] } }'
    • format
      • http://<ambassador_url>/seldon/<namespace>/<model-name>/api/v1.0/doc/

  • 다음과 같은 결과를 얻을 수 있습니다.

    1{"data":{"names":["t:0","t:1","t:2"],"ndarray":[[0.0006985194531162841,0.003668039039435755,0.9956334415074478]]},"meta":{"requestPath":{"classifier":"seldonio/sklearnserver:1.7.0"}}}

Seldon-analytics

Install

  • helm chart 설치 
    1helm install seldon-core-analytics seldon-core-analytics \\
2 --repo <https://storage.googleapis.com/seldon-charts> \\
3 --namespace seldon-system

Usage

  • 설치된 seldon-core-analytics port-forward

    1kubectl port-forward svc/seldon-core-analytics-grafana 3000:80 -n seldon-system

  • http://localhost:3000 에 접속합니다.

    • admin / password 로 로그인 합니다.
    • dashboard에서 prediction analytics를 클릭합니다
    • 다음과 같은 dashboard를 볼 수 있습니다.

item.title: 밑바닥부터 시작하는 Seldon-Core - 설치 [Istio Ver.]
item.description:
밑바닥부터 시작하는 Seldon-Core 순서

  1. 설치
    1. 밑바닥부터 시작하는 Seldon-Core - 설치 [Istio Ver.]
    2. 밑바닥부터 시작하는 Seldon-Core - 설치 [Ambassador Ver.]

Pre-requisites

  1. Minikube
  2. Helm
  3. Ingress
  4. Istio

1. Minikube

사용한 minikube version은 다음과 같습니다.

1> minikube version
2minikube version: v1.20.0
3commit: c61663e942ec43b20e8e70839dcca52e44cd85ae

minikube의 default config는 memory의 경우 2048mb 입니다. 이 경우 실습 중 메모리가 부족해서 OOM이슈가 생겨서 정삭적으로 진행할 수 없을 수 도 있습니다. OOM을 방지하기 위해서 minikube의 메모리를 4096mb로 늘려줍니다.

1> minikube config set memory 4096
2❗ These changes will take effect upon a minikube delete and then a minikube start

minikube를 실행시킵니다.

 1> minikube start
 2😄 minikube v1.20.0 on Ubuntu 18.04
 3✨ Automatically selected the docker driver. Other choices: virtualbox, ssh
 4👍 Starting control plane node minikube in cluster minikube
 5🚜 Pulling base image ...
 6🔥 Creating docker container (CPUs=6, Memory=4096MB) ...
 7🐳 Preparing Kubernetes v1.20.2 on Docker 20.10.6 ...
 8 ▪ Generating certificates and keys ...
 9 ▪ Booting up control plane ...
10 ▪ Configuring RBAC rules ...
11🔎 Verifying Kubernetes components...
12 ▪ Using image gcr.io/k8s-minikube/storage-provisioner:v5
13🌟 Enabled addons: storage-provisioner, default-storageclass
14🏄 Done! kubectl is now configured to use "minikube" cluster and "default" namespace by default

2. Helm

helm 공식 홈페이지의 방법을 따라 합니다. 이 때 버전은 3 이상이어야 합니다.
여러 방법중 스크립트 방법을 이용해 설치하겠습니다.

1curl -fsSL -o get_helm.sh <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/helm/helm/master/scripts/get-helm-3>
2chmod 700 get_helm.sh
3./get_helm.sh

3. Ingress

minikube에서 ingress addon 을 사용합니다.

1> minikube addons enable ingress
2 ▪ Using image k8s.gcr.io/ingress-nginx/controller:v0.44.0
3 ▪ Using image docker.io/jettech/kube-webhook-certgen:v1.5.1
4 ▪ Using image docker.io/jettech/kube-webhook-certgen:v1.5.1
5🔎 Verifying ingress addon...
6🌟 The 'ingress' addon is enabled

4. Istio

Istio 공식홈페이지 가이드를 따라합니다.

Download Istio

스크립트를 이용해 다운로드합니다.

1curl -L <https://istio.io/downloadIstio> | sh -
2cd istio-1.9.5
3export PATH=$PWD/bin:$PATH

Install Istio

istioctl을 이용해 설치합니다.

1> istioctl install --set profile=demo -y
2✔ Istio core installed
3✔ Istiod installed
4✔ Egress gateways installed
5✔ Ingress gateways installed
6✔ Installation complete

default namespace에 istio-injection을 시켜서 istio-system이 생성되게 합니다.

1> kubectl label namespace default istio-injection=enabled
2namespace/default labeled

ingress ip and ports

  • ingress port 설정하기

    1export INGRESS_PORT=$(kubectl -n istio-system get service istio-ingressgateway -o jsonpath='{.spec.ports[?(@.name=="http2")].nodePort}')
2export SECURE_INGRESS_PORT=$(kubectl -n istio-system get service istio-ingressgateway -o jsonpath='{.spec.ports[?(@.name=="https")].nodePort}')

  • port 확인하기

    1> echo "$INGRESS_PORT"
230687

    1> echo "$SECURE_INGRESS_PORT"
230520

  • Ingress ip 설정하기

    1export INGRESS_HOST=$(minikube ip)

  • ip 설정 확인하기

    1> echo "$INGRESS_HOST"
2192.168.49.2

Seldon-core

Install seldon-core

  • namespace 생성

    1> kubectl create namespace seldon-system
2
3namespace/seldon-system created

  • helm chart 생성

    1helm install seldon-core seldon-core-operator \\
2 --repo <https://storage.googleapis.com/seldon-charts> \\
3 --set usageMetrics.enabled=true \\
4 --namespace seldon-system \\
5 --set istio.enabled=true

  • 상태 확인

    1> kubectl get po -n seldon-system
2NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE
3seldon-controller-manager-559c567c9-pjtpl 1/1 Running 0 11s

Istio setting

  • istio-ingress.yaml

     1## istio-ingress.yaml
 2apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
 3kind: Gateway
 4metadata:
 5 name: seldon-gateway
 6 namespace: istio-system
 7spec:
 8 selector:
 9 istio: ingressgateway ## use istio default controller
10 servers:
11 - port:
12 number: 80
13 name: http
14 protocol: HTTP
15 hosts:
16 - "*"

  • 다음과 같은 istio ingress 를 생성 후 apply 합니다.

    1> k apply -f istio-ingress.yaml
2gateway.networking.istio.io/seldon-gateway created

Sample deploy

  • namespace 생성

    1kubectl create namespace seldon

  • pod 생성

     1kubectl apply -f - << END
 2apiVersion: machinelearning.seldon.io/v1
 3kind: SeldonDeployment
 4metadata:
 5 name: iris-model
 6 namespace: seldon
 7spec:
 8 name: iris
 9 predictors:
10 - graph:
11 implementation: SKLEARN_SERVER
12 modelUri: gs://seldon-models/sklearn/iris
13 name: classifier
14 name: default
15 replicas: 1
16END

  • minikube tunnel

     1> minikube tunnel
 2Status:
 3 machine: minikube
 4 pid: 117019
 5 route: 10.96.0.0/12 -> 192.168.49.2
 6 minikube: Running
 7 services: [istio-ingressgateway]
 8 errors:
 9 minikube: no errors
10 router: no errors
11 loadbalancer emulator: no errors

  • ingress external ip 확인하기

    1> k get svc -n istio-system
2NAME TYPE CLUSTER-IP EXTERNAL-IP PORT(S) AGE
3istio-egressgateway ClusterIP 10.104.239.89 <none> 80/TCP,443/TCP,15443/TCP 7m43s
4istio-ingressgateway LoadBalancer 10.111.24.207 10.111.24.207 15021:30945/TCP,80:30687/TCP,443:30520/TCP,31400:30072/TCP,15443:32717/TCP 7m43s
5istiod ClusterIP 10.99.171.243 <none> 15010/TCP,15012/TCP,443/TCP,15014/TCP 7m58s

    → 이 경우 10.111.24.207

  • predict 요청 날려보기

    1curl -X POST <http://10.111.24.207/seldon/seldon/iris-model/api/v1.0/predictions> \\
2 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\
3 -d '{ "data": { "ndarray": [[1,2,3,4]] } }'
    • format
      • http://<ingress_url>/seldon/<namespace>/<model-name>/api/v1.0/doc/

  • 다음과 같은 결과를 얻을 수 있습니다.

    1{"data":{"names":["t:0","t:1","t:2"],"ndarray":[[0.0006985194531162841,0.003668039039435755,0.9956334415074478]]},"meta":{"requestPath":{"classifier":"seldonio/sklearnserver:1.7.0"}}}

Seldon-analytics

Install

  • helm chart 설치

    1helm install seldon-core-analytics seldon-core-analytics \\
2 --repo <https://storage.googleapis.com/seldon-charts> \\
3 --namespace seldon-system

Usage

  • 설치된 seldon-core-analytics port-forward

    1kubectl port-forward svc/seldon-core-analytics-grafana 3000:80 -n seldon-system

  • http://localhost:3000 에 접속합니다.

    • admin / password 로 로그인 합니다.
    • dashboard에서 prediction analytics를 클릭합니다
    • 다음과 같은 dashboard를 볼 수 있습니다.
